title: 🔒 Password Protected QRs!
message: Take control of your data with our biggest security update yet. Now you can lock your QR codes behind a secure password.
points: 🔐 Secret QRs: Password-protect URLs, Wi-Fi, Contacts, and more!
🖼️ Fresh Branding: Added beautiful new banner styles to make your QRs pop.
⚡ Faster History: We've optimized the history tab so your past creations load instantly.

title: 🔔 The Update Hub is Here!
message: We've added a beautiful new way to keep you perfectly in sync with our latest tools and features.
points: ✨ In-App Notifications: See when new updates are available right from your home screen.
📖 Interactive Version History: Tap the checkmark icon to read past update notes anytime.
🚀 Performance Boost: Faster QR generation and smoother scrolling.
